title: Smoky Filipino Lamb Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful meal-prep dish featuring tender lamb slices in a smoky sauce with a touch of sweetness from pineapple, balanced with a tangy pickle.

ingredients.name: Pickles
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped, optional for extra tangy flavor

ingredients.name: Soja Tempeh
ingredients.notes: For a vegan option, substitute with tempeh cubes

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft and translucent.
Toss lamb with salt, pepper, paprika, and soja tempeh (or ground beef for non-vegan version).
Stir fry until the meat is browned on all sides.
Fold in pineapple chunks and pickles if using.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, basil or mint.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
